{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205237F1719C50C47E009286AF"}"},"total":959},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7339820532051542808","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然是单女主，而且是原创女主，不过这本和我之前看的一些刚上来就一直答辩攻击的不一样，目前看到168章还没有这些。当了管事大爷，治了贾易两家，又没有恶心到自己。挺符合我胃口的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708937912,"group_id":"7288348058440436798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9/qwAuBYb0klV0vpgr1H6FL/3Ma/u0fGadt/jlzgN9p","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790605&x-signature=YlzhmTSXCiJ8jjqgO%2BoHwuKOIgo%3D","user_id":"4059047759461527","user_name":"无极前辈的汉昭武帝"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4059047759461527","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7288348058440436798","book_info":{"abstract":"[四合院+空间+种田+轻戾气+智商在线+爽文+单女主]
　　一场意外，猪脚赵东升来到情满四合院。
　　随同而来的还有福地空间系统。
　　成为了采购员。
在那个物资紧缺的时代，自己是多么的吃香。
　　.........
　　小麦种上，水稻种上，玉米种上，水果必须安排上。
　　鸡鸭鱼鹅牛统统养上。
　　至于门外那些闹腾的领居们，赵东升默默的关上房间大门，进入福地空间吃香喝辣。
　　苟到风口到来，扶摇直上，活出一世精彩！！！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c1eccb903b4f0dedf4b9f9d0107b38ae","author":"桃月灼灼","author_id":"","book_id":"7288348058440436798","book_name":"四合院：身为采购员的我有空间","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8c8c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":495,"name":"四合院","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=495&name=四合院&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7288348085321728574","read_count":"30651","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2933811"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.7","serial_count":"1009","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,空间,单女主,四合院,同人,1v1,无后宫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/2ecf669e73ca0a6f96c74c8b9b65e770~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454357&x-signature=uxwG3aRYyts5iiZn9FNgmZJYz6c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"105145135929","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"206"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205237F1719C50C47E009286AF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19441,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11944},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7497655535593390872","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"四合院核心内容没问题 剧情节奏也很好 整体风格轻松惬意 阴谋诡计很小 因为设定和主角智商 基本无敌 作者很聪明 小说在很多关键点 都会和 读者沟通 格局也没有写的越来越大 收不回来或者跑题 每个角色的人生轨迹和细节 作者也写了很多笔墨 剧情融了很多其他年代文 但是没有像很多作者那样写跑偏 写成年代文了 作者还是以四合院为主的写 并把其他的年代剧 碎片化的 融合进四合院 比如 南易和傻柱的对比 梁拉弟和秦淮如的对比 使得故事更加的精彩 有些年代文的基本功很好 人文 环境 时代 都写的很好 不太确定的 也会解释 或者用修饰手法标注 整体来说 非常好的四合院小说 但是不完美的地方也是有的 剧情太长了 说水吧 也不水 各种鸡毛蒜皮的事情太多了 但是四合院的核心就是 鸡毛蒜皮 弥补遗憾 快人一步 作者还都一直写着 情况就挺尴尬的 不过书确实不错[我也强推][雀食神作][已种草][书架加一]","text_exts":[{"e":3,"s":0,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774270357009286AF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227497655535593390872%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227288348058440436798%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":173,"s":170,"text":"年代剧","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B9%B4%E4%BB%A3%E5%89%A7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774270357009286AF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227497655535593390872%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227288348058440436798%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B9%B4%E4%BB%A3%E5%89%A7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745687100,"group_id":"7288348058440436798","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"全是🤮全是💩
